name: CPS Cap
description: Emulates how the k55 cps cap worked.

max-cps.name: Max CPS
max-cps.description: CPS cap for the k55 recreation, default is 16.6667 as that's the k55 cps cap.

hold-fraction.name: Press/Release Split
hold-fraction.description: How much of each click cycle is the minimum press (hold) lockout. the rest is the minimum gap before the next press. 0.5 splits the K55's ~60 ms cycle into ~30 ms press + ~30 ms release lockouts. Raise it if short taps should register as longer holds, lower it if the gap between clicks should be enforced harder.

per-button.name: Cap Buttons Separately
per-button.description: instead of the cap effecting all buttons globally together, it would effect every keys cps individually.
